description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian wearing a varsity-style jacket with contrasting sleeves and a large wing motif on the back. He has on knee-length shorts with printed text, one long legging on the right leg, and open-toed sandals. The figure sports a spiked hairstyle and wears large over-ear headphones and a face mask with a bold graphic. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is casual, suggesting a leisurely walk or pause. The clothing and accessories evoke a modern, urban streetwear aesthetic, suitable for a city or park environment. The overall build and proportions are consistent with an average adult male.
description: A casually dressed adult male in urban streetwear, featuring a varsity jacket, shorts, headphones, and a face mask, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the varsity jacket, face mask, headphones, and shorts with visible text.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the headphones, spiked hairstyle, and the length of the shorts and legging.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wing motif on the back of the jacket and the full length of the shorts and legging.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other sleeve, the side of the face mask, and the sandal on the right foot.
attribute_clothing_type: casual streetwear with a varsity jacket, knee-length shorts, one long legging, and a face mask
